official_protocol: SUSTech-SYSU manifest with repo task mappings
shadow_protocol_v1: SUSTech-SYSU manifest with same repo task mappings
notes: Same dataset family across official and shadow paths.
Shadow tasks intentionally reuse repo-normalized labels.
This is the main intentional protocol gap.

notes: Full 10-fold shadow family was not run in one pass due cost.

notes: Green-channel masked proxy used to stay close to paper behavior.

official_protocol: augplus_v2 in current strong official pattern line
notes: No color jitter used in shadow augmentation.
